footer.alberta: © 2026 Intelligent Singularity Inc. · Alberta, Canada · Hospedagem própria com 100% de energia renovável

changelog.title: What changed, in order.
changelog.lede: Every visible change we have made to this site, with the release date and the commit behind it.

status.title: How everything is running.
status.lede: This page is pulled live from our public status monitor. If the numbers look wrong, tell us — that is part of keeping this honest.
status.degraded: Degraded — at least one service affected

roadmap.title: What is next, and why.
roadmap.lede: We list what the studio is actually working on. No aspirational fluff, no dates we cannot hit — if it is not in motion, it is marked planned.

insights.title: Field notes from the studio.
insights.lede: Short, grounded essays. We write slowly. We cite everything. No clickbait, no thought-leadership fog.

trust.title: Where to find the proof.
trust.lede: Every claim we make about security, privacy, sustainability, and access links to the evidence. You should never have to take our word for it.
trust.certsEmpty: None yet. When we are certified, it will show up here with a link to the evidence.

help.title: We can usually help in one click.
help.lede: Pick the row that sounds most like your question. Every link goes somewhere real — no gated forms, no chatbots.
